title: Inter-Sith Wars period
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=Old Republic-era}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
{{Era
|image=[[File:TreatyofCoruscantborders.jpg]]
|name=
|years=[[3950 BBY]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II||Old Sith Wars}}</ref><ref name="KOTOR Campaign">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>–[[2000 BBY/Legends|2000 BBY]]<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
|jurisdiction=

*[[Galactic War]]<ref name="TOR" />
*[[Third Galactic War]]<ref name="TOR" />
|events=Blazing of the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]]<ref name="Atlas" />
}}
{{Quote|Our time has come. For 300 years, we prepared. We grew stronger. While you rested in your cradle of power, believing your people were ''safe''... and ''protected''. You were trusted to ''lead'' the Republic—but you were deceived, as our powers over the dark side have blinded you. You assumed no force could challenge you...and now...''finally''...we have returned.|[[Darth Malgus]] during the invasion of the Jedi Temple|audio=InvasionOfTheJediTemple.flac|<ref name="TOR" />}}
This '''historical period''' occurred between the events of the [[Old Sith Wars]] and the [[New Sith Wars]].

==Timeline==
{{Quote|When the Emperor planned the Republic's destruction, he did not foresee the need for alliances. The Sith would sweep through the galaxy, systematically exterminating their age-old Jedi enemies and dismantling the proud Republic.|The [[Holocron/Legends|Holocron]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Gnost-Dural]] on the [[Great Galactic War]]|audio=NeedForAlliances-Timeline5.flac|<ref name="TOR" />}}
*[[3950 BBY]]
**The [[Old Sith Wars]] end.
**The [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]], through not entirely legal means, attempts to take control over the [[Telosian Restoration Project]].<ref name="tsl">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>
**Queen [[Elsinoré den Tasia]] ascends to the planetary throne of [[Grizmallt/Legends|Grizmallt]], and sponsors the scout [[Kwilaan/Legends|Kwilaan]], who discovers [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>
**The [[Kanz Disorders/Legends|Kanz Disorders]], though beginning nearly two decades before the end of the Old Sith Wars, continue for nearly three more centuries.

*[[3946 BBY]]
**Sixteen worlds ruled by [[G0-T0 infrastructure planning system|G0-T0]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[Secession of 400100500260026|secede]] from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] to form the independent territory of [[400100500260026]].
**The Republic, under the directive of [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Tol Cressa]], [[Liberation of 400100500260026|retakes 400100500260026]].<ref name="negd">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

*c. [[3900 BBY/Legends|3900 BBY]]
**The planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] is colonized by settlers from [[Grizmallt/Legends|Grizmallt]].<ref name="NEC" />

*c. [[3756 BBY]]
**[[Eison Gynt]] dies on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Timeline 7: Peace for the Republic?">{{TORweb|url=holonet/galactic-history|text=Timeline 7: Peace for the Republic?|int=Timeline 7: Peace for the Republic?}}</ref>

*[[3743 BBY]]
**[[Riegenn Hetuu]] and his [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Unidentified Hutt (Riegenn Hetuu)|client]] died on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]].<ref name="3743TOR">The Prologue of ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' takes place in [[3643 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:TOR dates/1|here]]. As {{TORcite|type=codex|K'lor'slug}} is acquired on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], the events of which in-game are concurrent with the Prologue, and a source{{Fact}} states that [[Riegenn Hetuu]]'s [[Death/Legends|death]] on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] occurred a [[Standard century/Legends|century]] ago, Hetuu and his client died in [[3743 BBY]].</ref>

*[[3704 BBY]]
**[[Freia Kallea/Legends|Freia Kallea]] connects the [[Celanon Spur/Legends|Spurs of Celanon]] at [[Serenno/Legends|Serenno]] with the [[Morellian Trail]] at [[Telos IV]].

*[[3701 BBY]]
**A scoutship named [[Hope (scoutship)|''Hope'']] was disabled and crash-landed on the remote planet of [[Nuvar]]. This occurred while its pilot, [[Freia Kallea/Legends|Freia Kallea]], was searching for a route that "would span the entire galaxy."

*[[3700 BBY/Legends|3700 BBY]]
**The [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]] is discovered by [[Freia Kallea/Legends|Freia Kallea]].
**[[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] begins to serve as a trade outpost for the region surrounding it.

*[[3681 BBY]]
**The [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|resurgent Sith Empire]] under the rule of the [[Tenebrae|Sith Emperor]] returns from the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. The [[Imperial Navy (Sith Empire)|Imperial Armada]] attacks the [[Korriban's orbital security station|Galactic Republic space station]] above [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], reclaiming the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] homeworld and beginning the [[Great Galactic War]].<ref name="Return">{{TORweb|url=info/media/trailers/return|text="Return"|int=Return (cinematic trailer)}}</ref>

*[[3671 BBY]]
**The [[Battle of Bothawui (Second; Great Galactic War)|Battle of Bothawui]] takes place.

*[[3670 BBY]]
**The [[Kanz Disorders/Legends|Kanz Disorders]] end.
**The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] free the [[Lorrdian/Legends|Lorrdians]] from [[Argazdan/Legends|Argazdan]] control.

*[[3667 BBY]]
**[[Imperial Intelligence (Sith Empire)|Imperial Intelligence]] sponsors a [[Mandalore the Lesser|Mandalorian gladiator]] in the arenas of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] in hopes of using him to rally the Mandalorians to the Sith.
**Through Imperial manipulation, the [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]] is given the ancient title of [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] by cheering crowds in the Geonosian arena.

*[[3661 BBY]]
**The new Mandalore marshals the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] into an army once more and forms an alliance with the Sith, blockading the Republic's most critical trade route.

*[[3660 BBY]]
**Succeeding where the Jedi have failed, a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] convoy under the leadership of [[Hylo Visz]] breaks the Mandalorian blockade and restores the Republic's trade route.

*[[3659 BBY]]
**Republic hero and [[Mirialan/Legends|Mirialan]] smuggler [[Hylo Visz]] is rumored dead after attempting to double-cross the Hutts.

*[[3653 BBY]]
**The [[Sacking of Coruscant]] by the Sith Empire occurs, followed a few days later by the [[Treaty of Coruscant]], ending the Great War and starting the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]].<ref name="torfaq">{{TORweb|url=info/faq#356|text=How does Star Wars: The Old Republic relate to Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic?}}</ref>

*[[3641 BBY]]
**The Cold War ends.
**The [[Galactic War]] begins.

*[[3628 BBY]]
**The [[third Galactic War]] begins.

*c. [[3522 BBY]]
**[[Darth Desolous]] is born.

*[[3500 BBY]]
**The [[Iktotchi/Legends|Iktotchi]] race is discovered by the Galactic Republic.
**The [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on Coruscant is expanded.

*[[3350 BBY]]
**The [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]] is founded as an independent territory.

*[[3100 BBY]]
**The [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] seals its borders with the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

*c. [[3053 BBY]]
**[[Vandelhelm/Legends|Vandelhelm]] is discovered by the Republic.

*[[3017 BBY]]
**The [[Seventeenth Alsakan Conflict|seventeenth]] and final conflict of the [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|Alsakan Conflicts]] ends.

*[[3000 BBY]]
**[[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]] is colonized by [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] colonists.
**The [[War of the Gungan tribes]] takes place.<ref name="GB">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref><ref name="Atlas" />
**The [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] are unified under Boss [[Gallo/Legends|Gallo]].<ref name="GB" /><ref name="Atlas" />
**Boss [[Rogoe/Legends|Rogoe]] dies.<ref name="GB" /><ref name="Atlas" />
**[[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]] is built.<ref name="GB" /><ref name="Atlas" />
**[[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] joins the Galactic Republic. {{Circa}}

*[[2996 BBY]]
**[[Saalo Morn]] fails to become a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and crosses over to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]].

*[[2992 BBY]]
**The planet [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] leaves the [[Paecian Empire]].

*[[2989 BBY]]
**The ''[[Sayings]]'', an [[Atrisia/Legends|Atrisian]] manuscript written by [[Uueg Tching]], is stored in the [[Atrisian Imperial Historical Library]].

*[[2700 BBY]]
**The city of [[Kala'din (city)|Kala'din]] on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] collapses.

*[[2500 BBY/Legends|2500 BBY]]
**The Jedi Temple on Coruscant is expanded, including the addition of the [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Jedi Archives]].

*[[2367 BBY]]
**The annual [[Priole Danna Festival]] on [[Lamuir IV]] begins.

*[[2320 BBY/Legends|2320 BBY]]
**[[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]] is colonized as an agricultural outpost.

*c. [[2200 BBY/Legends|2200 BBY]]
**The height of [[Saffa (species)|Saffa]] [[Saffa paintings|painting]] begins.

*[[2032 BBY]]
**Coruscant experiences its last major groundquake.
**The [[Koorivar/Legends|Koorivar]] are expelled from [[Kooriva/Legends|Kooriva]] by an indigenous species.

*c. 2,000 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
**[[Durge/Legends|Durge]] is born.

*c. [[2000 BBY/Legends|2000 BBY]]
**[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Darth Ruin/Legends|Phanius]] absconds from the Jedi Order with a stolen [[Holocron/Legends|Holocron]].
**The departure from the Jedi Order of Phanius and his followers becomes the [[Fourth Great Schism]].
**Phanius takes the name [[Darth Ruin/Legends|Darth Ruin]] and starts a [[new Sith]] Empire.
**Darth Ruin is soon betrayed and killed by his followers.
**The [[New Sith Wars]] begin.
